title: AdminFreeze
description: A plugin that allows you to freeze a player at the administrator's command
body:
**AdminFreeze** - This is a new plugin that adds the ability to secure your server. The administrator can freeze a violator with a single command.
## Capabilities & Features
- **Freeze Command** - If the player is not frozen, it freezes them, preventing them from moving and breaking blocks, dealing and receiving damage, and placing blocks. If a player is frozen, it unfreezes the player.

## Commands
```/freeze```, ```/adminfreeze```

## Permissions
```adminfreeze```, ```adminfreeze.freeze```, ```adminfreeze.reload``` - **Initially available for op**
